package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for string_format_for_error_wrap: `fmt.Errorf("failed: %s", err.Error())` where `%s` on `err.Error()` is used instead of `%w` on `err`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
func scenario647Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
